Work Experience

Jun 2022 – Present
Software Developer
Priceline
- Architected and migrated legacy authentication to a React and Node.js Okta-based system, improving reliability and scalability for millions of daily users.
- Led frontend modernization using Next.js, TypeScript, and shadcn/ui, enforcing consistency and accessibility through a shared design-system library.

Oct 2021 – Jun 2022
Full Stack Developer
Myplanet
- Delivered Composable.com, a production-grade site built with Next.js and TypeScript.
- Integrated headless CMS content models with preview and publishing workflows.

Nov 2020 – Oct 2021
Software Developer
Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce
- Implemented and optimized frontend features for digital banking applications.
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams on accessibility and performance improvements.

May 2019 – Nov 2020
Full Stack Developer
Code Clan NG
- Built curriculum-aligned full-stack projects for student cohorts.
